name: Alsace Apple Tart
recipeIngredient: 7 tablespoons Unsalted butter; cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
-To make pastry:
- Sift flour and salt into a large bowl. Cut in butter until the mixture resembles bread crumbs. With a fork, lightly mix in sugar, egg yolk, and enough ice water to form a dough. Press into a ball and wrap in plastic. Refrigerate for 30 minutes.
-
-On a floured surface, roll out dough to fit a 9-inch springform pan, including sides. Place dough in the pan without stretching it. Pierce bottom with fork. Preheat oven to 400 degrees F (200 degrees C).
-To make filling:
- Peel, quarter, and core apples. Thinly slice each quarter several times without cutting all the way through. Sprinkle with lemon juice. Arrange apples in pastry shell. In a medium bowl, beat eggs and sugar until pale and creamy. Add cream and vanilla. Pour egg mixture over apples. Bake for 20 minutes, then reduce heat to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) and bake for 25 minutes longer or until custard filling is firm.
